{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph LR app["Application Code"] --> meadow["Meadow
(ORM)"] meadow --> foxhound["FoxHound
(Query DSL)"] foxhound --> conn["Connection
(mysql/mssql/sqlite)"] conn --> db[("Database")] meadow --> stricture["Stricture
(Schema)"] stricture --> output["JSON Schema
DDL
Documentation"] style app fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#43a047,color:#333 style meadow fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffa726,color:#333 style foxhound fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffcc80,color:#333 style conn fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffcc80,color:#333 style stricture fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffcc80,color:#333 style db fill:#ffebee,stroke:#ef5350,color:#333 style output fill:#f5f5f5,stroke:#bdbdbd,color:#666 ","style":"notebook"}
